overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses streets with moving traffic, and walks under elevated highways past holographic advertisements and storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with neon signage and street railing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a busy street, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple jacket walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure spanning across the street ahead
tall buildings covered with glowing neon advertisements and holographic displays
green metal railing separating sidewalk from street
tall pole with traffic signals and crosswalk indicators

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a neon-lit city sidewalk at night, passing other pedestrians. The street is lined with a green metal railing, and an elevated highway overpass looms ahead. Bright holographic advertisements illuminate the buildings on the left.

events.description: character steps off sidewalk onto yellow-striped crosswalk
white sports car drives past from left to right across the intersection
entering shadow area beneath the elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street while navigating around moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
black garbage bags piled near the traffic light pole

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a wide crosswalk marked with bold yellow stripes and begins crossing the multi-lane street. A white sports car drives past through the intersection. As the character progresses, they move into the shadow cast by the elevated highway overpass overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway with commercial advertisements

events.description: passing large illuminated COLA advertisement billboard on the left

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass past holographic advertisements and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person standing near the COLA billboard looking at the advertisement

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying COLA branding with human figure
cars parked along the curb under the overpass

segments.scene_description: Now walking beneath the elevated highway in a sheltered, darker environment, the character passes a large illuminated COLA advertisement billboard. Several cars are parked along the right side of the street, and the concrete overpass structure dominates the sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial sidewalk with neon storefronts under overpass

agents.ego_description: continuing along the narrow sidewalk past various storefronts with glowing neon signs

entered.detail: various glowing signs including green OPEN sign and yellow arrow indicators
piles of boxes and debris along the building wall
metal barrel with flames inside providing warm light
tall building covered with large holographic advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a narrower sidewalk section lined with storefronts featuring bright neon signs, including a green OPEN sign. A burning trash can provides flickering light near stacked cardboard boxes, while towering holographic advertisements illuminate the right side of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk city that shifts from open, brightly lit sidewalks into the oppressive shadow of an elevated highway. It begins with the character walking past pedestrians along a green metal railing, where holographic advertisements cast a vivid glow over the surrounding buildings. As the character steps onto a yellow-striped crosswalk, a white sports car streaks past before the camera moves into the deep shadow cast by the looming highway overpass. The scene then transitions into a sheltered, darker environment beneath the concrete structure, passing a large illuminated COLA billboard and a row of parked cars. Finally, the path narrows into a corridor of storefronts and flickering neon signs, moving past a burning trash can and towering holograms that light up the urban alley.
